emails.subject: Pre-Party??
emails.body: Here are the directions to our house. Let me know if you need directions from different areas of town. Let's say 6:30 at our house and then we will head over to Enron Field at 8:00-8:30. Directions to our house in the Heights! 713-426-4566; 1001 W. Cottage 77009 If you are coming I-10 E (including 290 and Galleria area) Exit Studewood/Montrose. Take a left at the light. Continue down about a mile or so and turn right at the 2nd light 11th street. Go to the next light and turn left (Michaux Street). Turn left at the second street West Cottage and we are the first house on the right. (on the corner of Michaux and West Cottage) If you are coming I-45 N (from Clear Lake area) 45N and exit Main Street (you will drive past downtown and it will be one of your first exits). Once you exit, turn left at the light and go over the freeway. There will be a McDonald's and a KFC on your left. Turn left on the street between them (Pecore Street) Turn right at the second light...about a mile. (Michaux Street) Turn left at second left (W. Cottage) We are the first house on your right. (Corner of Michaux and W. Cottage) Hope everyone can make it! No need to bring anything unless you want something other than beer. Forwarded by Dawn C Kenne/HOU/ECT on 12/06/2000 04:02 PM Dawn C Kenne 11/28/2000 09:16 AM
